sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, scale UInt8);
SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, scale) AS converted_value, toTypeName(converted_value) FROM test_decimal;
UPDATE test_decimal SET scale = 3 WHERE value = '123.456';
SELECT value, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 2) AS zero_if_error FROM test_decimal WHERE scale > 0;
